_doc: Faithful-replay fixtures for a real faulted ResultValidation job (key 685af108-640a-4766-a24c-e23b980d67fa, folder Shared). UiPath.Testing.Activities.VerifyExpression threw System.NullReferenceException during operand/expression evaluation (Expression `[loadedValue.Length > 0]` dereferences the uninitialized String variable `loadedValue`). Scrubbed: UIP-PW06WJSK -> MOCK-HOST, UIPATH\DAN.MOROSANU -> UIPATH\REPLACEMENT_USER, dan.morosanu@uipath.com -> original_email@test.com.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key defb8e05-e36b-4c36-bf11-0b4d08ce6cd1 --state Faulted --output json

rules._doc: Generic jobs-list fallback returns only the single target job (this scenario isolates one faulted job).
Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback. Both trace forms (the Orchestrator Info stack and the job-log .NET stack) are already carried by the jobs get and jobs logs fixtures above; any unmatched command (including a bare/alternate trace lookup) falls through to [] with exit 0 — the NullReferenceException operand-evaluation signature does not depend on it.
